name: Maireana French Flax Linen Sheet Set

static_data.origin: Flax grown in France, sewn in Portugal

variant_skus.description: Our Maireana French Flax Linen Sheet Set in Sage brings the tranquillity of an Australian garden into your bedroom. Stonewashed to a soft, lived-in feel from night one, this muted sage tone pairs beautifully with natural timber and earthy neutrals.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Bring the calm of an Australian garden into your bedroom.

variant_skus.description: The Ochre colourway of our Maireana French Flax Linen Sheet Set brings warm, golden earth tones to your bedroom sanctuary. Stonewashed French flax linen with a rich, sun-drenched warmth — perfect for layering with botanical and neutral palettes.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Warm golden tones that glow in the morning light.

variant_skus.description: Crisp, clean and timeless — our Maireana French Flax Linen Sheet Set in White is stonewashed French flax at its purest. A classic choice that gets softer and more beautifully textured with every wash.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Timeless white linen — crisp, clean, and forever stylish.

variant_skus.description: The Sand colourway of our Maireana French Flax Linen Sheet Set is a whisper of warm, desert-toned linen. Stonewashed to silky softness, this neutral tone is effortlessly versatile and elevates any bedroom palette.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Warm neutral tones that whisper warmth without a word.

variant_skus.description: Make a sophisticated statement with our Maireana French Flax Linen Sheet Set in Charcoal. Deep, muted, and strikingly beautiful — this stonewashed French flax linen is as temperature-regulating as it is dramatic.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Sophisticated and bold — linen bedding that makes a statement.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Experience the effortless luxury of 100% pure French flax. Stonewashed for a lived-in feel from night one, our Maireana linen is temperature-regulating and gets softer with every wash.

care_instructions: Gentle machine wash cool (30°C)
Line dry in shade to prevent fading
Expect initial shedding—this is normal for natural flax fibres
Avoid bleach or harsh detergents
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: LINEN SHEDDING: Natural linen releases excess fibres in the first 3-4 washes. To manage this, wash separately and use wool dryer balls on a cool setting to help the shedding process along.

variant_skus.description: Our Maireana Duvet Cover in Sage features a coconut button closure and stonewashed French flax linen in a calming sage tone. The inner ties keep your duvet insert perfectly positioned all night.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Stonewashed sage linen with coconut button closure — effortlessly serene.

variant_skus.description: Warm ochre stonewashed French flax linen meets functional coconut button closure in our Maireana Duvet Cover. A rich, earthy statement piece that softens beautifully over time.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Ochre warmth meets coconut button closure for a truly artisan finish.

variant_skus.description: The classic White Maireana Duvet Cover is stonewashed French flax at its most refined — crisp, breathable, and endlessly versatile with coconut button closure and inner tie loops.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Pure white linen duvet — the forever classic for any bedroom.

variant_skus.description: Our Maireana Duvet Cover in Sand is a neutral, warm-toned stonewashed French flax linen piece with coconut button closure. Effortlessly timeless and sustainably crafted.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Neutral sand tones make every bedroom feel like a retreat.

variant_skus.description: A bold, sophisticated choice — our Charcoal Maireana Duvet Cover is deep-toned stonewashed French flax linen with coconut button closure. Pairs beautifully with natural oak furniture and earthy accents.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Deep charcoal linen for a bold, designer bedroom look.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Breathable linen duvet cover finished with natural coconut button closures and internal ties to keep your quilt perfectly in place.

care_instructions: Gentle cold machine wash
Line dry in shade
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: BUTTON CARE: Coconut buttons are natural and durable, but avoid running them through heavy, hot tumble dry cycles to prevent cracking.

static_data.origin: Ethically made in China (Closed Loop System)

variant_skus.description: Our Summer Weight Bamboo Lyocell Quilt Insert is crafted for warm nights — a lighter fill weight that keeps you cool and comfortable without sacrificing the silky softness of 100% bamboo lyocell. Perfect for Australian summers.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Cool, light, and silky — perfect for Australian summer nights.

variant_skus.description: The Winter Weight Bamboo Lyocell Quilt Insert offers a generous fill for those cooler months while remaining far lighter than traditional synthetic quilts. The bamboo lyocell shell is naturally temperature-regulating, keeping you cosy without overheating.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Cosy winter warmth in 100% plant-based bamboo lyocell.

content_triage.marketing_hook: The ultimate plant-based alternative to down. Hypoallergenic, temperature-regulating, and crafted in a closed-loop system.

care_instructions: Dry clean recommended, or gentle cold machine wash
Lay flat to dry
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: MAINTENANCE: Bamboo Lyocell can become heavy when wet. Ensure your washing machine can handle the weight, or seek professional cleaning for longevity.

variant_skus.description: Our Hemp Bed Runner in Natural is a beautifully textured piece in the raw, undyed colour of premium hemp fibre. Adds an organic, earthy accent to any bed end without synthetic dyes or treatments.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Raw, undyed hemp in its most beautiful natural state.

variant_skus.description: The Olive Hemp Bed Runner brings a rich, botanical tone to your bedroom. Naturally dyed hemp fibre with a beautifully coarse texture — a sustainably crafted accent that only gets better with age.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Rich botanical olive tones for a lush, nature-inspired finish.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Add grounded texture and warmth to the foot of your bed with this heavyweight, sustainable hemp fabric runner.

care_instructions: Spot clean preferred
Cold hand wash if necessary
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: HEMP WEAVE: Hemp is exceptionally strong. It will soften over years of use but starts with a robust, tactile texture.

variant_skus.description: Our Blush Silk Eye Mask is vegetable-dyed peace silk in a delicate rose tone — gentle on your skin and completely plastic-free. The soft elastic keeps it comfortably in place through the night.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Delicate blush peace silk — sleep in pure luxury.

variant_skus.description: The Navy Silk Eye Mask is a deep, sophisticated peace silk option with vegetable dye for a rich, consistent tone. Perfectly weighted to block light completely while remaining gentle on delicate eye skin.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Deep navy peace silk for a sophisticated night's rest.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Sleep deeply while protecting delicate skin. Made from vegetable-dyed peace silk to prevent sleep creases and block out the world.

care_instructions: Cold hand wash only with mild silk detergent
Dry flat in shade
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: DYE CARE: Vegetable dyes are gentle on the skin but can fade if exposed to direct sunlight or harsh chemicals. Hand wash only.

static_data.origin: Designed in Melbourne, Made in India

variant_skus.description: Our 5kg Weighted Blanket uses organic cotton shell filled with hypo-allergenic micro glass beads for a gentle, calming pressure ideal for lighter adults and teenagers. Scientifically shown to support better sleep quality.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Gentle 5kg pressure for lighter sleepers — calm on demand.

variant_skus.description: The 7kg Weighted Blanket is our most popular weight — perfectly calibrated for the average adult, using organic cotton shell and micro glass bead filling for deep, restorative pressure therapy.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Our most popular weight — the sweet spot for deep, restful sleep.

variant_skus.description: For those who love the deepest, most grounding pressure, our 9kg Weighted Blanket delivers maximum weighted therapy in an organic cotton shell with premium micro glass bead filling.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Maximum deep pressure for the heaviest sleepers.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Experience calming, deep-pressure stimulation. An organic cotton shell filled with micro glass beads for a grounding, plastic-free sleep.
technical_specs: Quilted grid for even weight distribution

care_instructions: Spot clean recommended
Machine wash cold on gentle cycle only if machine capacity allows
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: WEIGHT SELECTION: For optimal comfort, choose a blanket weight that is roughly 10% of your body weight. Available in 5kg ($200), 7kg ($220), and 9kg ($250).

variant_skus.description: Our Saltbush Dinner Plates in Speckled White are wabi-sabi handcrafted stoneware with a beautifully irregular speckled glaze. Each set of four is unique — no two pieces are identical, celebrating the art of the handmade.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Wabi-sabi speckled white stoneware — every plate beautifully unique.

variant_skus.description: The Matte Black Saltbush Dinner Plates are bold, modern stoneware with a sophisticated matte glaze finish. Wabi-sabi handcrafted, the subtle surface texture makes each plate in the set unique.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Bold matte black stoneware that elevates every meal to an event.

variant_skus.description: Our Saltbush Dinner Plates in Earth are warm, terracotta-toned handcrafted stoneware with wabi-sabi character. The raw, organic glaze celebrates imperfection and brings the warmth of natural clay to your table.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Warm terracotta earth tones for an authentic, artisan table.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Elevate your daily ritual with our Saltbush ceramics. Each plate is hand-glazed, meaning no two pieces are identical—bringing a sense of 'Wabi-Sabi' and organic beauty to your table.

care_instructions: Avoid thermal shock (moving from freezer to hot oven)
Use non-abrasive detergents to maintain glaze luster
Stack with felt dividers to prevent surface scratching
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: THERMAL SAFETY: While microwave safe, stoneware retains heat efficiently. Always use a cloth or mitt when removing plates from the microwave to avoid burns.

variant_skus.description: Our Saltbush Ramen Bowl in Speckled White is a deep, wide-form wabi-sabi stoneware piece with a beautiful speckled glaze. Perfectly sized for ramen, poke bowls, or generous grain salads.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Handcrafted wabi-sabi stoneware — the perfect vessel for your ramen.

variant_skus.description: The Matte Black Saltbush Ramen Bowl is a deep, wide-form handcrafted stoneware piece with a striking matte glaze. Bold and beautiful at the table, and sustainably crafted for everyday use.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Restaurant-worthy matte black stoneware for serious noodle nights.

content_triage.marketing_hook: A deep, wide-brimmed bowl designed perfectly for hearty soups, pastas, and salads. Hand-glazed for a unique finish.

care_instructions: Dishwasher safe
Avoid thermal shock
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: WABI-SABI: Expect slight variations in the glaze. This is the hallmark of handmade ceramics, not a defect.

variant_skus.description: Our Round Acacia Wood Serving Paddle is sustainably harvested and hand-oiled for a rich natural grain finish. The circular form makes it ideal for cheese, antipasto, or small charcuterie arrangements.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Round, rustic, and ready to impress — the entertainer's essential.

variant_skus.description: The Rectangle Acacia Wood Serving Paddle offers more surface area for generous grazing boards or whole loaves of artisan bread. Sustainably harvested acacia with a beautiful hand-oiled grain finish.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Generous rectangle acacia for boards that wow every crowd.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Serve in style. Sustainably harvested Acacia wood, sealed with food-safe mineral oil to showcase the beautiful natural grain.

care_instructions: Hand wash only; never soak
Re-oil with food-safe mineral oil every 3-6 months
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: WOOD MAINTENANCE: Do not place in the dishwasher. Exposure to prolonged moisture or heat will warp and crack the timber.

variant_skus.description: Our Recycled Glass Tumblers in Clear showcase the thick, eco-friendly glass with beautiful natural bubbles and slight irregularities that tell the story of their recycled origins. A set of four that gets better with use.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Classic clear recycled glass — imperfect, honest, and beautiful.

variant_skus.description: The Amber Recycled Glass Tumblers bring warmth and depth to your table — thick eco-friendly glass in a rich amber tone with natural bubbles and artisan irregularities.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Warm amber recycled glass that turns every drink into an occasion.

variant_skus.description: Our Bottle Green Recycled Glass Tumblers are a stunning deep green with the characteristic thick walls and natural bubbles of true recycled glass. An eco-conscious statement at any table setting.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Stunning bottle green recycled glass with character in every sip.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Thick, durable glass made from post-consumer waste. Perfect for everyday hydration or evening cocktails.

care_instructions: Dishwasher safe
Avoid pouring boiling water directly into cold glass
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: RECYCLED IMPERFECTIONS: Tiny air bubbles or slight ripples in the glass are natural characteristics of the recycling process.

variant_skus.description: Our Brass & Wood Salad Servers pair polished brass handles with a sustainably sourced teak paddle in a minimalist design. An elegant, long-lasting alternative to plastic serving utensils.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Polished brass and sustainable teak — the entertaining essential.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Minimalist elegance for your dining table. Featuring polished brass heads and sustainable teak handles.

care_instructions: Hand wash only
Dry immediately to prevent water spots on brass
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: BRASS CARE: Brass naturally patinas over time. To restore shine, use a natural paste of lemon juice and baking soda, rub gently, and rinse.

variant_skus.description: Our Travel Bamboo Cutlery Set arrives in a natural-draw Charcoal Pouch — a sleek, sustainable zero-waste dining kit for everyday commuters, travellers, or lunchbox heroes.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Sleek charcoal pouch for zero-waste travel in style.

variant_skus.description: The Sage Pouch Travel Bamboo Cutlery Set is a beautifully botanical-toned sustainable dining kit. Organic bamboo cutlery in a natural-draw sage canvas pouch — zero plastic, maximum style.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Botanical sage pouch for eco-conscious adventurers.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Never use single-use plastic again. A reusable knife, fork, spoon, and straw safely housed in an organic canvas pouch.

care_instructions: Hand wash bamboo to preserve lifespan
Machine wash pouch on cold
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: TRAVEL READY: Meets TSA and airport security standards for carry-on luggage.

variant_skus.description: Our 1200ml Zero-Waste Bento Box is a double-tier stainless steel lunch container with a leak-proof lid — the perfect plastic-free alternative for work, school, or picnic lunches.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Double-tier stainless steel lunch box — zero waste, all flavour.

content_triage.marketing_hook: A double-tier stainless steel lunchbox featuring a bamboo lid that doubles as a chopping board. The ultimate plastic-free prep station.

care_instructions: Steel base is dishwasher safe
Hand wash bamboo lid
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: LEAK PROOFING: While highly water-resistant due to the silicone seal, it is not 100% leak-proof for thin liquids like soup.

variant_skus.description: Our Beeswax Wrap Starter Pack comes in three sizes — Small, Medium, and Large — made from organic beeswax-infused cotton cloth. A beautiful, plastic-free alternative to cling wrap for wrapping food, covering bowls, or storing cheese.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Three sizes, one pack — beeswax wraps for every food storage need.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Ditch the cling wrap for good. Our wraps use locally sourced WA beeswax and organic cotton to keep your food fresh naturally. They are breathable, reusable, and fully compostable.
technical_specs: WA Beeswax, Jojoba Oil, Pine Resin

care_instructions: Wash in cool, soapy water
Do not use with raw meat or hot food
Air dry away from heat sources
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: REVIVAL TIP: If your wraps lose their stickiness, place them on baking paper in a 100°C oven for 2 minutes to redistribute the wax. Remove and hang to cool instantly.

variant_skus.description: Our plant-based Vegan Wax Wrap Pack comes in three sizes in the Mixed S/M/L assortment. Made from plant wax-infused cotton cloth — a fully vegan, plastic-free wrap solution for all your food storage needs.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: 100% plant-based wax wraps — sustainable food storage, sorted.

content_triage.marketing_hook: The plant-based alternative. 100% vegan wraps using Candelilla wax to replace single-use plastics in your fridge.
technical_specs: Candelilla Wax, Soy Wax, Tree Resin

care_instructions: Wash in cool water
Keep away from heat
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: STIFFNESS: Vegan wax can feel slightly stiffer than beeswax initially. The warmth of your hands will mold it perfectly over bowls.

variant_skus.description: Our Clear Silicone Stretch Lids in a 6 Pack stretch tightly over any bowl, pot, or container of various sizes. Transparent, food-safe, and infinitely reusable — the zero-waste kitchen essential that replaces cling wrap and tin foil.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Stretch over anything, store everything — zero waste made easy.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Food-grade silicone lids that stretch to fit bowls, jars, and even half-cut fruit. The ultimate airtight seal.

care_instructions: Dishwasher safe
Ensure edges are dry before stretching over a container
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: USAGE: For a perfect seal, press down on the center of the lid while pulling the tabs over the edges of the bowl to expel excess air.

variant_skus.description: Our Compostable Sponge Cloths in the Wattle Print feature a beautiful golden wattle design on a natural compostable cloth. Replaces hundreds of disposable sponges and is 100% compostable at end of life.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Golden wattle print on compostable sponge cloth — clean with pride.

variant_skus.description: The Gum Nut Print Compostable Sponge Cloths bring an iconic Australian botanical print to your kitchen. 100% compostable, absorbent, and beautifully designed to make sustainable cleaning joyful.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Iconic Australian gum nut print — eco cleaning with local heart.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Absorbs 15x its weight in water. These cellulose and cotton blend cloths replace paper towels and break down cleanly in your compost.

care_instructions: Machine washable up to 60°C
Can be boiled for 1 minute to sterilize
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: DISPOSAL: Simply cut into small pieces and bury in your home compost. Breaks down completely in 6-8 weeks.

variant_skus.description: Our Natural Coconut Coir Scourer 4 Pack is made from tough natural husk fibres — an effective, plastic-free scrubbing solution for pots, pans, and surfaces that fully composts at end of life.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Tough natural coconut coir — scrub hard, guilt free.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Tough on grease, safe on non-stick. Made from natural coconut husk fibres, bypassing synthetic plastic sponges entirely.

care_instructions: Rinse and shake dry after use
Store in a well-ventilated spot
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: RUST PREVENTION: The core wire is galvanized but continuous submersion in water may eventually cause minor rust. Hang to dry.

variant_skus.description: Our 500ml Glass Pantry Jar is borosilicate glass with an airtight bamboo lid — the smallest in our pantry range, perfect for herbs, spices, nuts, or small grains. Beautiful on the bench or in the pantry.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Compact 500ml borosilicate jar — pantry perfection for small spaces.

variant_skus.description: The 1L Glass Pantry Jar is the mid-size of our borosilicate glass pantry range with airtight bamboo lid — ideal for rice, oats, pasta, or coffee beans. Stackable and beautifully minimalist.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: 1L versatility in airtight borosilicate glass — the pantry essential.

variant_skus.description: Our largest 2L Glass Pantry Jar is borosilicate glass with an airtight bamboo lid — designed for bulk dry goods like flour, grains, or legumes. A zero-plastic pantry hero that looks as good as it functions.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Generous 2L borosilicate glass for bulk-buying sustainability.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Elevate your pantry organization. Borosilicate glass jars fitted with an airtight bamboo suction lid for maximum freshness.

care_instructions: Glass is dishwasher safe
Hand wash bamboo lids and dry immediately
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: AIRTIGHT SEAL: The silicone ring can be removed for deep cleaning if storing strongly scented foods. Available in 500ml ($9), 1L ($14), and 2L ($20).

variant_skus.description: Our 15m Roll of Unbleached Baking Paper is toxin-free, non-stick parcel paper from sustainably managed forests. Unbleached for a natural brown tone — completely plastic-free and 100% compostable.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: 15 metres of toxin-free, compostable baking paper — guilt-free baking.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Chlorine-free, totally compostable parchment paper for baking. Safe for your food and the earth.

care_instructions: Single or double use depending on baking mess
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: COMPOSTING: Once heavily soiled with oils, toss it directly into your green bin or home compost.

variant_skus.description: Our Bower Recycled Wool Throw in Grey Tartan is a heavy fringe throw woven from premium recycled wool in a classic grey plaid pattern. Draped over a linen sofa or armchair, it brings cosy, sustainable warmth to any living space.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Classic grey tartan recycled wool — heritage warmth for modern homes.

variant_skus.description: The Oatmeal Bower Recycled Wool Throw is a neutral, warm-toned recycled wool piece with heavy fringe — the perfect sustainable accent for any living room palette.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Neutral oatmeal recycled wool — cosy, timeless, effortlessly styled.

variant_skus.description: Our Bower Recycled Wool Throw in Navy is a deep, classic navy recycled wool throw with heavy fringe. Rich, timeless, and sustainably crafted for lasting warmth.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Deep navy recycled wool throw — bold warmth for a statement living room.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Heavy, warm, and highly durable. Woven entirely from recycled wool garments, giving new life to textile waste.

care_instructions: Cold machine wash on wool cycle
Do not tumble dry
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: WOOL CARE: Recycled wool can be slightly coarser than virgin merino. It softens with use but is incredibly robust and resistant to pilling.

variant_skus.description: Our Round 2m Jute Area Rug is hand-braided from natural jute fibre in a beautiful circular form. Adds warm, organic texture to any living space while supporting sustainable natural fibre craft.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Hand-braided 2m round jute rug — natural texture underfoot.

variant_skus.description: The Rectangle 2x3m Jute Area Rug is hand-braided natural jute in a classic rectangular format — generous enough for a living room centrepiece or under a dining table.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Generous 2x3m rectangle jute rug — anchor your space in natural style.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Hand-braided natural jute that adds organic texture to any room. Hardwearing and earth-friendly.

care_instructions: Vacuum regularly without beater bar
Spot clean spills immediately by blotting
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: SPROUTING: It is normal for loose fibres (sprouts) to appear. Do not pull them; simply trim flush with the rug surface using sharp scissors.

variant_skus.description: Our Hemp Floor Cushion in Rust is an oversized casual seating piece in a rich, warm rust tone. Natural hemp canvas outer with a sustainably sourced fill — beautiful on the floor for lounging or meditation.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Rich rust hemp — earthy oversized comfort for any floor.

variant_skus.description: The Sage Hemp Floor Cushion is an oversized, calming green-toned natural hemp canvas floor cushion. Perfect for meditation corners, reading nooks, or casual extra seating.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Calming sage hemp floor cushion — botanical comfort you can sit in.

content_triage.marketing_hook: An oversized cushion for casual floor seating, featuring a durable hemp cover and filled with eco-friendly recycled PET fibre.

care_instructions: Removable cover is cold machine washable
Plump regularly to maintain shape
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: FILLING: The recycled PET fill mimics the loft of standard polyester but keeps plastic bottles out of landfill.

variant_skus.description: Our Banksia Mix Dried Native Arrangement features striking banksia cones, protea, and native Australian dried botanicals in a beautiful eucalyptus branch vessel. Zero water, infinite beauty — sustainably harvested native flora.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Iconic banksia blooms — Australian native beauty, preserved forever.

variant_skus.description: The Eucalypt Mix Dried Native Arrangement celebrates Australian native botanicals with silvery eucalyptus leaves, pods, and native dried florals. A naturally fragrant, zero-maintenance sustainable arrangement.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Fragrant eucalypt mix — bring the Australian bush indoors.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Preserved Australian native flowers that last forever. No water required—just place and enjoy the structural beauty of the bush.

care_instructions: Keep away from direct sunlight to prevent bleaching
Do not place in humid areas (e.g., bathrooms)
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: DUSTING: Use a hairdryer on the lowest, cool setting to gently blow dust off the arrangement every few months.

variant_skus.description: Our Bamboo Bath Sheet is the most generous size in our towel range — ultra-absorbent bamboo and organic cotton blend in a beautifully plush weave. Incredibly soft, fast-drying, and sustainably crafted.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Oversized bath sheet in ultra-soft bamboo — luxury worth every cent.

variant_skus.description: The Bamboo Hand Towel is the everyday workhorse of our towel range — ultra-absorbent bamboo and organic cotton blend in a perfect mid-size. Soft, quick-drying, and built to last.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Perfectly sized bamboo hand towel — soft, absorbent, and plastic-free.

variant_skus.description: Our Bamboo Face Washer is the smallest and softest member of the towel family — gentle enough for daily skincare routines, with the same ultra-absorbent bamboo and organic cotton blend.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Gentle bamboo face washer — tender care for your skin, daily.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Ultra-absorbent and naturally antimicrobial. Our bamboo-cotton blend dries quickly and stays fresh longer.

care_instructions: Machine wash warm
Tumble dry low
Avoid fabric softeners
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: ABSORBENCY: Fabric softeners coat the fibres and destroy the bamboo's natural absorbency. Use white vinegar in the rinse cycle instead. Available as a Face Washer ($15), Hand Towel ($35), or Bath Sheet ($55).

variant_skus.description: Our Diatomite Stone Bath Mat in Grey is a minimalist, ultra-absorbent bath mat carved from natural diatomite. The grey tone suits modern bathroom aesthetics while the stone surface dries instantly and resists mould naturally.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Cool grey diatomite — instant-dry, endlessly hygienic bath mat.

variant_skus.description: The Sand Diatomite Stone Bath Mat brings a warm, neutral tone to your bathroom floor. Carved from natural diatomite, it absorbs water instantly, air-dries in minutes, and never harbours mould.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Warm sand diatomite mat — natural beauty that dries in seconds.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Step onto solid stone that dries instantly. Made from fossilised algae, this mat absorbs water rapidly, preventing mould and damp smells.

care_instructions: Wipe with a damp cloth to clean
Sand gently with fine grit sandpaper if absorbency drops
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: FRAGILITY: Ensure the mat is placed on a completely flat, hard surface. Placing it on plush carpet or an uneven tile can cause it to crack under weight.

variant_skus.description: Our Rose Gold Safety Razor features an intricately diamond-knurled brass handle with a warm rose gold plating — the most premium finish in our range. The textured grip provides exceptional control for a close, luxurious shave.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Beautifully weighted rose gold brass — the zero-waste razor that turns heads.

variant_skus.description: The Matte Black Safety Razor offers a sleek, powder-coated brass handle with a clean minimalist look. A sophisticated choice for the modern zero-waste bathroom.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Powder-coated matte black — understated precision for a zero-waste shave.

variant_skus.description: The classic Silver Safety Razor features a polished chrome-finish brass handle — timeless, durable, and perfectly weighted for effortless shaving with zero plastic waste.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Classic chrome silver knurling — precision zero-waste shaving, perfected.

content_triage.marketing_hook: The ultimate plastic-free shave. A beautifully weighted brass handle designed to last a lifetime while giving a closer, smoother shave.

care_instructions: Rinse thoroughly after use
Store outside the shower to prevent soap scum buildup
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: TECHNIQUE: Do not apply pressure like a plastic razor. Let the weight of the brass handle do the work to prevent nicks.

variant_skus.description: Our Safety Razor Blades 10 Pack contains stainless steel double-edge blades compatible with any three-piece safety razor. Made to last and fully recyclable — 10 blades, zero plastic packaging.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: 10-pack stainless steel blades — sharp, plastic-free, and long-lasting.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Standard stainless steel double-edge blades. Sharp, durable, and fully recyclable.

care_instructions: Store in a dry place
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: DISPOSAL: Store used blades in a 'blade bank' (a small tin or jar). Once full, tape securely and recycle with scrap metal.

variant_skus.description: Our Eucalyptus Toilet Cleaning Bombs fizz on contact, releasing powerful natural eucalyptus oil to clean, deodorise, and freshen your toilet bowl. Chemical-free, plastic-free, and genuinely effective.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Drop, fizz, and clean — eucalyptus freshness without harsh chemicals.

variant_skus.description: The Lemon Toilet Cleaning Bombs use zesty lemon essential oil to naturally clean and brighten your toilet bowl. Chemical-free, 100% compostable packaging — a citrus-fresh sustainable bathroom essential.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Drop, fizz, and clean — bright lemon freshness, zero nasty chemicals.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Fizzing cleaning tablets that make toilet scrubbing easy. Naturally antibacterial without the harsh bleach fumes.
technical_specs: Baking soda and citric acid base

care_instructions: Keep tin sealed tightly to prevent moisture activation
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: USAGE: Drop one bomb into the bowl, let it fizz for 5 minutes, scrub with your brush, and flush.

variant_skus.description: Our Charcoal Konjac Facial Sponge is infused with activated charcoal — ideal for oily or acne-prone skin. The deeply cleansing charcoal draws out impurities while the soft konjac fibre gently exfoliates.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Detoxifying charcoal konjac — deep cleanse for oily skin, naturally.

variant_skus.description: Our Pink Clay Konjac Facial Sponge is infused with rose-tinted kaolin clay — ideal for sensitive or dry skin. Gently cleanses and soothes while delivering a beautiful blush-pink tint to the sponge.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Gentle pink clay konjac — soothing care for sensitive skin.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Made from the root of the konjac plant, this sponge gently exfoliates and balances pH without the need for plastic microbeads.

care_instructions: Rinse and squeeze out excess water after use
Hang to dry completely between uses
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: LIFESPAN: Replace every 4-6 weeks when the sponge begins to break down naturally. Compost the old sponge.

variant_skus.description: Our Kakadu Plum Solid Shampoo Bar for Normal Hair is packed with Australian native Kakadu plum extract for a vitamin C–rich cleanse. One bar replaces 2–3 bottles of liquid shampoo — plastic-free and salon-quality.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Balanced lather for everyday hair — shampoo the sustainable way.

variant_skus.description: The Dry Hair Kakadu Plum Solid Shampoo Bar is enriched with extra moisturising botanicals and Kakadu plum extract to nourish and hydrate thirsty hair. A deeply conditioning plastic-free cleanse.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Nourishing kakadu plum formula for deeply moisturised, dry hair.

variant_skus.description: Our Oily Hair Kakadu Plum Solid Shampoo Bar uses a targeted formula to balance and clarify oily scalps with Kakadu plum extract and gentle astringent botanicals. Plastic-free, zero waste, and effective.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Clarifying formula that rebalances oily hair without stripping it.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Clean hair, clear conscience. One bar replaces up to three plastic bottles of liquid shampoo. Infused with wild-harvested Kakadu Plum for high antioxidant protection.

care_instructions: Keep bar dry between uses using a draining soap dish
Lather in hands or directly onto wet hair
Store away from direct shower spray
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: DETOX PERIOD: If moving from commercial sulphate shampoos, your hair may feel 'waxy' for 1-2 weeks as it detoxes. Stick with it—your natural oils will balance out.

variant_skus.description: Our Hydrating Macadamia Solid Conditioner Bar is rich in plant-based macadamia oil — a deeply nourishing, plastic-free conditioner for dry or normal hair. Lathers beautifully and leaves hair silky and smooth.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Rich macadamia conditioning — one bar replaces three plastic bottles.

variant_skus.description: The Volumising Macadamia Solid Conditioner Bar uses a lightweight macadamia oil formula to condition without weighing fine hair down. Adds body and shine — plastic-free and sustainably crafted.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Lift and condition — macadamia volume in a zero-waste bar.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Deeply moisturising solid conditioner enriched with Australian macadamia oil to tame frizz and lock in hydration.

care_instructions: Glide directly over wet hair ends
Store on a well-draining dish
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: APPLICATION: Conditioner bars don't foam. Rub the bar directly onto the mid-lengths and ends of your wet hair until you feel 'slip'.

variant_skus.description: Our Natural Deodorant Paste in Lemon Myrtle is a toxin-free, baking-soda-free formula with fresh Australian lemon myrtle essential oil. Effective all-day odour protection without aluminium or synthetic fragrance.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Native lemon myrtle freshness — aluminium-free all-day protection.

variant_skus.description: The Rose & Geranium Natural Deodorant Paste is a soft, floral-scented toxin-free formula with Australian rose and geranium essential oils. Gentle on sensitive underarm skin and effective all day.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Floral rose and geranium — naturally effective, beautifully scented.

variant_skus.description: Our Unscented Natural Deodorant Paste is a completely fragrance-free, toxin-free formula for sensitive skin or fragrance-free lifestyles. Aluminium-free, baking-soda-free, and genuinely effective.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Fragrance-free aluminium-free deodorant — gentle protection, pure and simple.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Aluminium-free deodorant in a recyclable tin. Uses shea butter and kaolin clay to neutralize odor all day naturally.

care_instructions: Apply a pea-sized amount with fingers
Keep away from extreme heat
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: SENSITIVITY: If you experience redness, you may have a bicarb sensitivity. Discontinue use and contact support for our bicarb-free option.

variant_skus.description: Our Mineral Foundation Powder in Light is a vegan loose mineral powder for fair skin tones. Buildable coverage, SPF-mineral ingredients, and zero synthetic fragrances — breathable, sustainable beauty.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Light coverage mineral foundation — beautiful skin in a refillable glass jar.

variant_skus.description: The Medium Mineral Foundation Powder is a vegan loose mineral formula for medium skin tones with buildable, natural-finish coverage and inherent SPF protection from zinc oxide.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Medium coverage mineral foundation — natural finish, sustainably refillable.

variant_skus.description: Our Tan Mineral Foundation Powder is a vegan loose mineral formula for tan skin tones — a warm, buildable coverage powder with inherent SPF protection and natural finish.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Warm tan mineral foundation — vegan coverage in a refillable glass jar.

variant_skus.description: The Deep Mineral Foundation Powder is a rich, warm-toned vegan loose mineral formula for deeper skin tones. Full buildable coverage with inherent SPF protection and a luminous natural finish.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Rich deep mineral foundation — full-coverage, plastic-free beauty.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Lightweight loose mineral powder with built-in SPF15 protection. Breathable coverage in a refillable container.
technical_specs: Zinc Oxide and Titanium Dioxide base

care_instructions: Apply with a kabuki brush
Keep moisture out of the container
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: REFILLS: Purchase our compostable refill pouches to top up your existing jar.

variant_skus.description: Our Rosy Red Tinted Lip & Cheek Balm is a zero-waste, compostable-packaged lip and cheek colour in a warm rose-red tint. Sheer, buildable coverage with nourishing natural waxes.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: A rosy flush of colour for lips and cheeks — zero-waste beauty.

variant_skus.description: The Nude Tinted Lip & Cheek Balm is a barely-there natural tone in our zero-waste compostable range — perfectly sheer, nourishing, and universally flattering.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Sheer nude tint for an effortless, natural look — compostable packaging.

variant_skus.description: Our Berry Tinted Lip & Cheek Balm is a deep berry-toned natural lip and cheek colour in zero-waste compostable packaging. Rich pigment with a natural wax formula — beautifully sustainable.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Bold berry tint for lips and cheeks — serious colour, zero plastic.

content_triage.marketing_hook: A zero-waste balm housed in a push-up compostable cardboard tube. Provides a sheer, buildable wash of colour for lips and cheeks.

care_instructions: Push up gently from the base
Store below 30°C to prevent melting
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: PUSH TUBE: If the balm is hard to push up in winter, warm the tube in your hands for a minute first.

variant_skus.description: Our Bamboo Toothbrush 4 Pack comes in a mix of naturally dyed handle colours — a fun, zero-waste alternative to plastic toothbrushes. Compostable bamboo handles with BPA-free nylon bristles.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: A family pack of bamboo toothbrushes — sustainable smiles for everyone.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Moso bamboo handles with charcoal-infused bristles. Each brush is numbered to prevent mix-ups in family bathrooms.

care_instructions: Store in an upright, dry position
Snap off the bristle head before composting the handle
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: BRISTLES: While the handle is 100% compostable, the nylon bristles must be removed with pliers and placed in general waste.

variant_skus.description: Our Mint Toothpaste Tablets With Fluoride are chewable, water-activated toothpaste pellets in a glass jar — a zero-plastic oral care option with added fluoride for cavity protection.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Chew, brush, rinse — plastic-free fluoride toothpaste in tablet form.

variant_skus.description: The Fluoride Free Mint Toothpaste Tablets are chewable, water-activated toothpaste pellets in a glass jar — a zero-plastic oral care option for those who prefer a natural fluoride-free formula.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Natural fluoride-free toothpaste tablets — clean teeth, clean conscience.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Say goodbye to unrecyclable plastic tubes. Chewable toothpaste tabs housed in a refillable glass jar. Perfect for travel and zero-waste living.

care_instructions: Keep lid tight to prevent moisture
Chew 1 tablet, wet brush, and brush normally
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: FOAMING: These tablets foam less than traditional toothpaste because they lack SLS, but they clean just as effectively.

variant_skus.description: Our Mint Corn Starch Dental Floss is vegan, plant-based floss with a fresh mint coating in a refillable glass jar. A zero-plastic, compostable daily flossing option.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Biodegradable silk floss in mint — the sustainable finish to your routine.

content_triage.marketing_hook: 100% vegan floss made from plant-based corn starch, lightly coated in Candelilla wax, inside a refillable glass vial.

care_instructions: Refill with bare spools when empty
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: COMPOSTING: PLA requires industrial composting facilities to break down completely; it will take much longer in home compost bins.

variant_skus.description: Our Copper Tongue Cleaner is a pure copper U-shaped tongue scraper — the ancient Ayurvedic practice of tongue scraping, reimagined in a sustainably crafted, naturally antimicrobial form.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Natural antimicrobial copper — the ancient secret to fresh breath.

content_triage.marketing_hook: A traditional Ayurvedic tool. Pure copper naturally eliminates bacteria, improving oral hygiene and breath far better than brushing alone.

care_instructions: Scrape gently from back to front
Rinse with warm water after use
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: TARNISH: Copper oxidizes and tarnishes naturally. To shine it, rub with a mixture of salt and lemon juice, then rinse.

variant_skus.description: The 'Flow' Menstrual Cup Model 1 is designed for lighter flows and pre-childbirth anatomy — medical-grade silicone in the smallest size for comfortable, leak-free wear for up to 12 hours.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Model 1 for lighter flow — smaller profile, maximum comfort.

variant_skus.description: The 'Flow' Menstrual Cup Model 2 is designed for post-childbirth anatomy — medical-grade silicone in a slightly wider size for optimal comfort and reliable leak-free wear up to 12 hours.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Model 2 post-birth fit — trusted capacity, lasting comfort.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Medical-grade silicone cup that completely replaces tampons and pads. Reusable for up to 10 years, saving money and massive landfill waste.

care_instructions: Boil for 5 minutes between cycles to sterilize
Wash with mild, unscented soap during use
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: SIZING: Model 1 is generally for under 30s who haven't given birth vaginally. Model 2 is for over 30s or those who have.

static_data.origin: Designed in Australia, Made in China

variant_skus.description: Our Organic Cotton Period Briefs in a Black Bikini cut are a low-rise, everyday silhouette in certified organic cotton with an integrated leak-proof lining for light to moderate flow days.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Everyday bikini cut in black — leak-proof, washable, reliable.

variant_skus.description: The High Waist Black Organic Cotton Period Briefs offer full coverage and support for heavier flow days or night wear — certified organic cotton with an integrated multi-layer leak-proof lining.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: High-waist support for heavier days — confident coverage, all day.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Highly absorbent, leak-proof underwear holding up to 3 tampons worth of fluid. Comfortable organic cotton against your skin.

care_instructions: Rinse in cold water until it runs clear
Machine wash cold
Line dry, strictly no tumble dry
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: FABRIC CARE: Never use fabric softeners or bleach, as they break down the high-tech absorbent layers.

variant_skus.description: Our Day Pack Reusable Cloth Pad Set contains softer, lighter pads in bamboo velour for comfortable daytime wear. Snap-fastened, washable, and made to last years — the zero-waste period alternative.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Light day pads — soft organic cotton, reusable for years.

variant_skus.description: The Night Pack Reusable Cloth Pad Set contains longer, more absorbent pads in bamboo velour for overnight protection. Generously sized with snap fastening — the zero-waste overnight option.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Longer overnight pads — maximum coverage while you sleep.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Soft bamboo velour pads with secure snap wings. A breathable, chemical-free alternative to disposable plastic pads.

care_instructions: Soak in cold water
Machine wash warm with normal detergent
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: STAINING: Some staining over time is normal for natural fabrics and does not mean they are unhygienic. Sun-drying helps naturally bleach stains.

static_data.origin: Designed in Byron Bay, Made in China

variant_skus.description: Our Modern Cloth Nappy in Eucalypt Print features a beautiful Australian botanical print in muted greens on a waterproof outer shell with a reusable bamboo insert. Adjustable for newborn through to toddler.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Gentle eucalypt print on organic muslin — soft as a whisper.

variant_skus.description: The Wattle Print Modern Cloth Nappy celebrates Australia's national flower in a golden illustrated print on waterproof outer shell. Reusable bamboo insert, adjustable sizing, and zero single-use plastic.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Golden wattle print muslin wrap — Australian love wrapped around baby.

variant_skus.description: Our Sage Solid Modern Cloth Nappy is a clean, botanical-toned waterproof outer shell in a minimalist sage colour. Reusable bamboo insert, adjustable sizing, and beautifully simple.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Calm sage solid organic muslin — pure softness for precious skin.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Adjustable waterproof shell with ultra-thirsty bamboo inserts. Designed to fit from newborn to toddler (OSFM).

care_instructions: Dry pail used nappies
Pre-wash warm, main wash hot (60°C)
Line dry shells, inserts can be tumble dried low
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: FIT: Ensure the elastics sit snugly in the groin crease, not on the thigh, to prevent leaks.

variant_skus.description: Our Biodegradable Baby Wipes 80 Pack is bamboo viscose wipes pre-moistened with a gentle aloe and chamomile formula. Fully compostable, plastic-free packaging — the zero-waste baby essential.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Ultra-soft bamboo wipes, 80-pack — gentle care without the plastic guilt.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Gentle on sensitive skin and the earth. 99% pure water wipes made from bamboo viscose, entirely free from plastic fibers.

care_instructions: Do not flush down toilets
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: DISPOSAL: While compostable, wipes used for heavy soiling should go in the general bin for hygiene reasons.

variant_skus.description: Our Kids Bamboo Dinner Set in Koala Grey features a drop-proof bamboo plate, bowl, and cup in a soft grey tone with a koala graphic embossed into the bamboo. Dishwasher safe and completely plastic-free.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Koala grey bamboo dinner set — drop-proof, plant-based, and totally adorable.

variant_skus.description: The Possum Pink Kids Bamboo Dinner Set is a soft blush-pink drop-proof bamboo plate, bowl, and cup set with an adorable possum emboss. Dishwasher safe, plastic-free, and made to last.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Possum pink bamboo dinner set — eco dinnerware that little ones (and parents) love.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Drop-proof and durable. Includes a plate, bowl, and cup made from compressed bamboo fibre, skipping the melamine.

care_instructions: Top rack dishwasher safe
Do not microwave
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: DURABILITY: Highly durable against drops on standard floors, but extreme force on hard tiles may cause cracking over time.

variant_skus.description: Our Natural Baby Balm in a 100g Tin is a zinc and calendula-enriched balm for nappy rash, dry skin, and general baby skincare in a reusable tin. No synthetic fragrance, no parabens — just clean, effective care.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Zinc and calendula baby balm — nature's barrier for the most delicate skin.

content_triage.marketing_hook: A soothing, multi-purpose barrier cream with Zinc and Calendula to rapidly treat nappy rash and dry patches.

care_instructions: Apply a thin layer to clean, dry skin
Store below 30°C
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: CLOTH SAFE: This balm uses natural oils that will easily wash out of cloth nappies, unlike thick petroleum-based creams.

static_data.origin: Designed in Perth, Manufactured in China (Ethical Audit: Grade A)

variant_skus.description: Our Stone Ultrasonic Diffuser in White Stone is a matte white ceramic diffuser with whisper-quiet ultrasonic technology and warm LED lighting. Adds calm aromatherapy to any room, sustainably crafted.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Whisper-quiet white ceramic diffuser — pure essential oil mist for mindful spaces.

variant_skus.description: The Black Stone Ultrasonic Diffuser is a bold matte black ceramic diffuser with whisper-quiet ultrasonic technology — a sophisticated addition to any modern living space or bedroom.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Bold matte black ceramic diffuser — aromatherapy meets contemporary design.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Transform your home into a sanctuary. The Stone Diffuser uses ultrasonic vibrations to disperse essential oils without heat, preserving their therapeutic properties. Its matte ceramic cover doubles as a piece of sculptural decor.

care_instructions: Wipe reservoir after every 3rd use
Use distilled water for best performance
Do not submerge base in water
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: TROUBLESHOOTING: If mist output is low, it is usually due to oil buildup on the ceramic oscillator disc. TO FIX: 1. Unplug the unit. 2. Dip a cotton bud in rubbing alcohol. 3. Gently wipe the small round disc at the bottom of the water tank. 4. Rinse with cool water.

variant_skus.description: The Bluebush Pure Air Micro in White is a compact desktop HEPA air purifier in a clean white finish — removes 99.97% of airborne particles in personal spaces. Whisper-quiet, energy-efficient, and beautifully designed.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Compact desktop HEPA purifier — removes 99.97% of particles for cleaner air.

content_triage.marketing_hook: A compact desktop HEPA-13 air purifier that silently removes 99.9% of pollen, smoke, and dust from your personal workspace.

care_instructions: Vacuum the outer pre-filter monthly
Replace main HEPA filter every 6-8 months
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: NOISE LEVEL: Features a whisper-quiet sleep mode operating at under 24dB.

variant_skus.description: Our Loop Rechargeable AA Battery Kit contains four lithium-ion AA batteries with a USB charging cradle. Replace disposable batteries for good — each battery lasts thousands of recharge cycles.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: AA rechargeable batteries — recharge 1000 times, skip the landfill.

variant_skus.description: The Loop Rechargeable AAA Battery Kit contains four lithium-ion AAA batteries with a USB charging cradle — a zero-waste power solution for remotes, clocks, and small devices.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: AAA rechargeable batteries — endless power, zero single-use waste.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Stop throwing batteries away. These lithium-ion batteries feature a built-in USB-C port for rapid charging, lasting over 1000 cycles.

care_instructions: Do not use in high-drain devices like camera flashes
Use included 4-in-1 charging cable
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: CHARGING: The LED indicator blinks while charging and remains solid when fully charged. Do not charge via traditional battery chargers.

variant_skus.description: Our 10000mAh Solar Power Bank features a bamboo casing with integrated solar panels — charge on the go using renewable sunlight or via USB. Two USB-A outputs for simultaneous device charging.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: 10,000mAh of solar-charged power — stay connected, off the grid.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Stay connected on any adventure. This rugged power bank features a bamboo casing and a high-efficiency solar panel for off-grid charging.

care_instructions: Keep ports clear of dust and sand
Avoid leaving in extremely hot cars (>50°C)
Wipe bamboo casing with a dry cloth only
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: SOLAR EXPECTATIONS: The solar panel is designed for emergency top-ups only. A full charge via sun can take 40+ hours. For daily use, charge via the included USB-C cable.

variant_skus.description: Our Kakadu Plum Zinc Balm SPF 50 in a Tin is a reef-safe, mineral zinc sunscreen enriched with Australian Kakadu plum extract. No oxybenzone, no octinoxate — just clean, effective sun protection in a reusable tin.

content_triage.marketing_hook: High-performance, reef-safe sun protection. This clear zinc formula rubs in easily, offering 4 hours of water resistance without the chemical footprint.

care_instructions: Store below 30°C
Apply 20 mins before sun exposure
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: APPLICATION: Warm the balm slightly between fingers before applying to help it glide on completely clear.

variant_skus.description: Our Mozzie Mist Insect Repellent is a 100ml glass spray bottle of DEET-free, essential oil–based insect repellent. Effective against mosquitoes and midges with a fresh botanical scent.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Effective protection without the DEET. Uses a highly concentrated Lemon Eucalyptus oil blend proven to deter sandflies and mosquitoes.

care_instructions: Shake well before use
Reapply every 2 hours
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: SENSITIVITY: Safe for children over 6 months, but always patch test on a small area of skin first.

variant_skus.description: Our Natural Hand Sanitizer in Native Citrus is a refillable, gel-based formula with a bright native citrus essential oil blend. 70% ethanol, no synthetic fragrance, no plastic waste.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Native citrus hand sanitizer — 70% ethanol, zero plastic, genuinely effective.

variant_skus.description: The Fragrance Free Natural Hand Sanitizer is a refillable 70% ethanol gel formula with zero added fragrance — ideal for sensitive skin or fragrance-free workplaces.

care_instructions: Keep away from naked flames
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: REFILLS: Purchase our 1L bulk pouches to refill your glass pump bottle and save plastic.

variant_skus.description: Our Rainforest Native Room Spray is a glass amber bottle room mist with deep green, earthy rainforest botanicals — Australian cedar, fern, and forest floor notes in a biodegradable spray formula.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Deep rainforest botanicals — turn any room into a forest retreat.

variant_skus.description: The Outback Native Room Spray captures the dry, golden warmth of Australian outback air — native botanicals including wattle, red earth, and warm wood notes in a refillable glass amber bottle.

static_data.origin: Wool from NSW, Felted in Nepal (Fair Trade)

variant_skus.description: Our Natural Wool Dryer Balls 3 Pack is made from solid 100% Australian wool — reduces drying time by up to 25%, naturally softens fabrics, and replaces chemical dryer sheets indefinitely.

rag_resources.manual_excerpt: SCENTING: Add 3-4 drops of your favorite essential oil directly to the balls before tossing them in for naturally scented laundry.

variant_skus.description: Our Storm-Proof Wooden Pegs 20 Pack are single-piece moulded hardwood pegs — no metal spring, no plastic, no rust. Engineered to grip in strong winds and last for years of outdoor use.

variant_skus.description: Our Canvas Laundry Hamper in Natural is a heavy-duty cotton canvas hamper with a natural undyed finish. Robust carry handles, collapsible design — a stylish, plastic-free laundry essential.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Heavy-duty cotton canvas laundry hamper — robust, collapsible, chemical-free.

variant_skus.description: The Grey Canvas Laundry Hamper is a heavy-duty cotton canvas piece in a clean neutral grey — robust, collapsible, and beautifully understated for any laundry or bedroom.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Contemporary grey canvas laundry hamper — robust, collapsible, and plastic-free.

content_triage.marketing_hook: A heavy-duty canvas bag suspended on a collapsible bamboo X-frame. Stylish enough for the bedroom, practical enough for heavy loads.

care_instructions: Canvas bag is machine washable cold
Wipe bamboo frame with damp cloth
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: CAPACITY: Holds roughly 60 Litres, equating to two standard wash loads.

variant_skus.description: Our Native Bee Hotel in Natural Timber is a hand-crafted hardwood structure packed with hollow bamboo tubes, pine cones, and natural nesting materials — a beautiful habitat for solitary native bees in any garden.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Handcrafted hardwood bee hotel — invite native bees in, and watch your garden thrive.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Support your local ecosystem. This hand-crafted hotel provides a nesting site for solitary native bees, who are vital for pollinating Australian flora.

care_instructions: Place in a sunny spot, facing North or North-East
Mount at least 1m off the ground
Keep clear of spiderwebs to protect bees
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: MAINTENANCE: Every 2 years, replace the internal bamboo tubes to prevent parasite buildup and ensure a healthy nesting environment for new generations.

variant_skus.description: Our Heirloom Native Seed Kit featuring WA Wildflowers contains a curated collection of Western Australian wildflower seeds in a beautiful recycled card and glass seed vial presentation. Supports native pollinator populations.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Native WA wildflower seeds — grow your own slice of Australian bush.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Bring the bush to your backyard. A curated box of non-GMO seeds including Billy Buttons, Everlastings, and Kangaroo Paw.

care_instructions: Store in a cool, dark, dry place until planting
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: SMOKE TREATMENT: Some native seeds (like Kangaroo Paw) benefit from smoke treatment before planting. Refer to the included guide for simple at-home methods.

variant_skus.description: Our Brass Plant Mister in Gold is a solid brass construction with a beautiful polished finish and a long-reach nozzle — the premium plant care tool for indoor plants and botanical collections.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Solid brass plant mister with a polished gold finish — beautiful form, functional care.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Keep your humidity-loving indoor plants thriving. A solid brass mister that creates a micro-fine spray while looking beautiful on your shelf.

care_instructions: Empty water if storing for long periods
Polish with lemon juice to restore shine
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: PUMP CARE: If the pump becomes stiff, apply a single drop of mineral oil to the plunge shaft.

variant_skus.description: Our Hemp Dog Leash in Olive is strong raw hemp fibre in a rich botanical olive green — a durable, naturally antibacterial leash with a solid brass clip and comfortable woven handle.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Earthy olive hemp lead — strong, sustainable, and stylish.

variant_skus.description: The Rust Hemp Dog Leash is raw hemp fibre in a warm, earthy rust tone — strong, naturally antibacterial, and a beautiful alternative to synthetic leashes.

variant_skus.description: Our Natural Hemp Dog Leash is undyed raw hemp fibre in its natural warm beige tone — strong, sustainable, and finished with a solid brass clip.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Classic natural hemp lead — simple, durable, plastic-free walks.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Stronger than cotton and softer than nylon. Our hemp leashes are naturally antimicrobial and get softer with every walk. Perfect for sensitive skin and heavy pullers.
technical_specs: Completely biodegradable at end of life

care_instructions: Hand wash with mild soap
Line dry only
Hemp is mould-resistant but should be dried if soaked in salt water
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: DURABILITY: Hemp is incredibly strong but is a natural fibre. Inspect regularly for fraying if your pet is a 'leash chewer'.

variant_skus.description: Our Natural Rubber Chew Toy in a Gum Nut Shape is made from sustainably tapped natural rubber — non-toxic, long-lasting, and shaped like a beloved Australian native. Safe for all dog sizes.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Gum nut shaped natural rubber chew toy — non-toxic, Australian, long-lasting.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Safe chewing for tough jaws. Made from sustainably tapped Hevea rubber, avoiding the toxic plastics found in cheap toys.

care_instructions: Dishwasher safe (top rack)
Discard if pieces are torn off
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: SAFETY: No toy is indestructible. Always supervise heavy chewers.

variant_skus.description: Our Speckled White Ceramic Pet Bowl is a heavyweight, chip-resistant stoneware bowl with a beautiful speckled glaze. Heavy enough to resist being pushed around — a sustainably crafted alternative to plastic pet bowls.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Handcrafted speckled white stoneware — feed your pet in style.

variant_skus.description: The Matte Black Ceramic Pet Bowl is a heavy, chip-resistant stoneware bowl in a bold matte glaze — a sophisticated, sustainably crafted alternative to plastic for the style-conscious pet owner.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Sleek matte black stoneware pet bowl — premium and plastic-free.

content_triage.marketing_hook: A heavyweight stoneware bowl that won't get tipped over. Designed to perfectly match our human dining range.

care_instructions: Dishwasher safe
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: HYGIENE: Ceramic is superior to plastic for pet bowls as it doesn't develop micro-scratches where bacteria breed, preventing pet acne.

variant_skus.description: Our Natural Dog Shampoo in Lavender & Mint is a 500ml pump bottle of gentle, natural surfactant dog shampoo with calming lavender and fresh mint essential oils. pH-balanced, biodegradable, and plastic bottle–free on refill.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Calming lavender and mint dog shampoo — gentle natural care in a 500ml pump.

variant_skus.description: The Unscented Natural Dog Shampoo is a 500ml pump bottle gentle dog shampoo with zero added fragrance — ideal for dogs with sensitive skin or smell sensitivities.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Fragrance-free natural dog shampoo — zero-scent care for sensitive coats.

content_triage.marketing_hook: A gentle, soap-free wash designed specifically for a dog's pH. Soothes sensitive, itchy skin without synthetic fragrances.

care_instructions: Keep out of eyes
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: UNSCENTED OPTION: If your dog has extreme allergies or hates baths, we recommend the Unscented variant to prevent overwhelming their nose.

variant_skus.description: Our Compostable Poop Bags 60 Pack is plant-based PLA bioplastic bags certified to EN13432 home compostable standards. Completely plastic-free and genuinely compostable — the responsible choice for dog owners.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: 60 certified compostable poo bags — clean walks, clean conscience.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Never leave plastic in the park. Thick, leak-proof bags made from corn starch that break down completely in compost.

care_instructions: Store in a cool, dry place
Use within 12 months of purchase
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: DISPOSAL: Can be placed in home compost bins meant strictly for ornamental gardens, not vegetable patches. Alternatively, place in general council waste.

variant_skus.description: Our 80g Native Plum Chocolate Block is an ethically traded dark chocolate bar with Australian Kakadu plum — a uniquely native flavour profile with an intensely fruity, complex character in plastic-free packaging.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Dark chocolate with Australian Kakadu plum — ethically traded, uniquely native.

content_triage.marketing_hook: A sharp, tart contrast to rich dark chocolate. Made with ethically sourced cacao and native Australian Davidson Plum.

care_instructions: Store in a cool, dry place below 22°C
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: ALLERGENS: Manufactured in a facility that also handles tree nuts and dairy.

variant_skus.description: Our Sleep Organic Loose Leaf Tea is a calming chamomile blend in a beautiful hand-sealed kraft paper pouch — naturally caffeine-free and organically grown for a gentle, restful evening ritual.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Calming chamomile for deep, restorative sleep — naturally.

variant_skus.description: The Awake Organic Loose Leaf Tea is a bold, full-bodied English Breakfast blend of organic black teas — a rich, malt-forward morning cup in a beautifully packaged kraft paper pouch.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: A bold English breakfast blend to start your day sustainably.

variant_skus.description: Our Digest Organic Loose Leaf Tea is a pure, bright peppermint blend in a kraft paper pouch — caffeine-free, organically grown, and naturally soothing for digestion after meals.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Soothing peppermint to support digestion — after every meal.

content_triage.marketing_hook: Skip the plastic microfibres found in standard tea bags. Hand-blended organic herbal teas presented in a beautiful, refillable tin.

care_instructions: Keep sealed to retain freshness
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: BREWING: Brew at 100°C for 3-5 minutes depending on desired strength.

variant_skus.description: Our White Ceramic Tea Strainer is a hand-pierced stoneware basket strainer for loose leaf tea — a beautiful, reusable alternative to single-use tea bags. Fits most standard mugs and teapots.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Hand-pierced stoneware tea strainer — beautiful, reusable, plastic-free brewing.

content_triage.marketing_hook: A completely plastic and metal-free way to brew your tea. Hand-pierced ceramic that fits perfectly over a standard mug.

care_instructions: Rinse immediately after use to prevent tannin staining
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: CLEANING: If tea stains build up, soak in warm water with a teaspoon of baking soda for an hour.

variant_skus.marketing_hook: Give the gift of sustainable living — $25 BlueBush gift card.

variant_skus.description: Our $50 BlueBush Digital Gift Card is delivered instantly by email — a thoughtful, sustainable gift for anyone who values conscious living. Redeemable on the full BlueBush range.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Give the gift of sustainable living — $50 BlueBush gift card.

variant_skus.description: The $100 BlueBush Digital Gift Card is delivered instantly by email — a generous, plastic-free gift for birthdays, housewarmings, or any occasion. Redeemable on the full BlueBush range.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Give the gift of sustainable living — $100 BlueBush gift card.

variant_skus.description: Our $200 BlueBush Digital Gift Card is the ultimate sustainable gift — delivered instantly by email and redeemable on the full BlueBush range. Perfect for weddings, major milestones, or as a corporate gift.
variant_skus.marketing_hook: Give the gift of sustainable living — $200 BlueBush gift card.

content_triage.marketing_hook: The perfect zero-waste gift. Instant delivery via email for the eco-conscious person who is hard to buy for.

care_instructions: Treat code like cash
rag_resources.manual_excerpt: REDEMPTION: Gift card codes can be entered at checkout. If the order total is less than the card value, the remaining balance is saved for future use.
